title: holographis verticillata
intro: Holographis verticillata, also known as Globe Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas, characterized by its globe-shaped flowers and a sprawling, shrub-like growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Globe Mallow has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as coughs, colds, and sore throats, and is also believed to have antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Holographis verticillata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent.
